description_long: This armchair features a boxy, modern silhouette with broad, straight armrests and a deep, inviting seat. The upholstery is a solid, dark blue-gray fabric that covers the entire chair, including the seat, backrest, and armrests, giving it a cohesive and contemporary look. The seat and backrest are both thickly padded, with the backrest displaying two subtle button tufts for added visual interest. The chair stands on four short, outward-angled wooden legs, which provide stability and a touch of warmth through their dark wood finish. The overall construction suggests a sturdy wooden frame beneath the upholstery, with foam or similar cushioning material for comfort. This armchair would be well-suited for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or residential living spaces.
description: A modern, boxy armchair with dark blue-gray upholstery, thick cushions, and short angled wooden legs. The design is sleek and comfortable, featuring broad armrests and subtle button tufting on the backrest.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide seat, thick backrest with two button tufts, and broad armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the straight, padded armrest and the depth of the seat and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the solid, unadorned back and the full width of the armchair.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the armrest and the angled wooden legs.
attribute_backrest_style: medium-high, straight, padded with two button tufts
